NJV Athens Plaza

★★★★★
🏛️ Acropolis View👑 Luxury
from €220 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Modern luxury hotel on Syntagma Square. Excellent for business travelers and those wanting central location.

Who Should Consider NJV Athens Plaza

NJV Athens Plaza is a 5-star upscale price-signal hotel in Syntagma, with an Acropolis-view signal and no rooftop-bar signal in the current dataset. It is tagged for business, central location, comfort.

  • Compare the area on the Syntagma hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • For rooftop stays, compare Athens rooftop bar hotels.

✓ Pros

  • Prime location
  • Modern rooms
  • Good value luxury

✗ Cons

  • No rooftop

Location

Located in Syntagma, 12-15 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 12-15 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
